I thought the movie was below expectations whereas Project Gutenberg was beyond all expectations. I saw it once on the big screen and watched it twice at home when it was out of theatres. It kept me on the edge of my seat the entire time. The majority of the movie is flashbacks to the incidents before Lee Man is arrested. There's unexpected twist to the plot towards the end of the movie. The Mummy also begins with a flashback to Imhotep's past.
